channel.title: NAN Mulfinger, J Lampl, A Dinkel, K Weidner, ME Beutel, MN Jarczok, G Hildenbrand, J Kruse, T Seifried-Dübon, F Junne, P Beschoner, H Gündel | PlatCOVID

item.title: [Psychological stress caused by epidemics among health care workers and implications for coping with the corona crisis: a literature review].
